repository_basis: The immutable paper names this repository in its abstract and code references; the queue requested this official repository.
checkout_method: git clone of the official repository followed by checkout and git archive of the pinned commit
paper_relation: The pinned commit is dated 2026-02-03, nearly one year after immutable arXiv v2 was updated on 2025-02-05. It is preserved as a later official release, not assumed to be the manuscript-time implementation.
acquisition_verification: Checked out the requested pinned commit from the official repository and archived its complete tracked tree.
Resolved the commit and tree identities directly with Git.
Counted 171 tracked files and 96 Python files from the pinned Git tree.
Confirmed that the tree contains base and compositional tasks, curriculum code, ServiceNow instance handling, and BrowserGym package integration suitable for the queued audit.
not_claimed: No deep review of the paper or repository was performed during source acquisition.
No ServiceNow instance was provisioned and no benchmark task or reported result was rerun.
The post-paper repository commit is not assumed to be byte-identical to the paper-time implementation.
